title: Xuan Dao Sect
content:
One of the top sects in the Rank 3 
Country of Zhao
. Its sect leader, Punan Zi is also a 
Nascent Soul
 Stage cultivator. After the death of the Nascent Soul Stage ancestors of the 
Heng Yue Sect
, they forcefully took over the Heng Yue Mountain and the territory of the 
Heng Yue Sect
.
